scripts.start:client: cross-env APP_ENV=local npm run dev -w client
scripts.start:client:development: cross-env APP_ENV=development npm run dev:development -w client
scripts.start:client:production: cross-env APP_ENV=production npm run start -w client
scripts.start:producer: cross-env APP_ENV=local npm run start:dev -w server/producer
scripts.start:producer:development: cross-env APP_ENV=development npm run start:dev -w server/producer
scripts.start:producer:production: cross-env APP_ENV=production npm run start:prod -w server/producer
scripts.start:consumer: cross-env APP_ENV=local npm run start:dev -w server/consumer
scripts.start:consumer:development: cross-env APP_ENV=development npm run start:dev -w server/consumer
scripts.start:consumer:production: cross-env APP_ENV=production npm run start:prod -w server/consumer
scripts.kpi:rollup: cross-env APP_ENV=local pnpm --filter consumer run job:kpi-rollup
scripts.recipe-ingestion:fetch: cross-env APP_ENV=local pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-fetch
scripts.recipe-ingestion:fetch:development: cross-env APP_ENV=development pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-fetch
scripts.recipe-ingestion:fetch:production: cross-env APP_ENV=production pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-fetch
scripts.recipe-ingestion:parse-submit: cross-env APP_ENV=local pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-parse-submit
scripts.recipe-ingestion:parse-submit:developmen: cross-env APP_ENV=development pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-parse-submit
scripts.recipe-ingestion:parse-submit:production: cross-env APP_ENV=production pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-parse-submit
scripts.recipe-ingestion:parse-retrieve: cross-env APP_ENV=local pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-parse-retrieve
scripts.recipe-ingestion:parse-retrieve:developm: cross-env APP_ENV=development pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-parse-retrieve
scripts.recipe-ingestion:parse-retrieve:producti: cross-env APP_ENV=production pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-parse-retrieve
scripts.recipe-ingestion:persist: cross-env APP_ENV=local pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-persist
scripts.recipe-ingestion:persist:development: cross-env APP_ENV=development pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-persist
scripts.recipe-ingestion:persist:production: cross-env APP_ENV=production pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-persist
scripts.recipe-ingestion:embed-submit: cross-env APP_ENV=local pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-embed-submit
scripts.recipe-ingestion:embed-submit:developmen: cross-env APP_ENV=development pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-embed-submit
scripts.recipe-ingestion:embed-submit:production: cross-env APP_ENV=production pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-embed-submit
scripts.recipe-ingestion:embed-retrieve: cross-env APP_ENV=local pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-embed-retrieve
scripts.recipe-ingestion:embed-retrieve:developm: cross-env APP_ENV=development pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-embed-retrieve
scripts.recipe-ingestion:embed-retrieve:producti: cross-env APP_ENV=production pnpm --filter consumer run job:recipe-ingestion-embed-retrieve
scripts.ci: pnpm run ci:install && pnpm run ci:build && pnpm run ci:lint && pnpm run ci:test
scripts.ci:lint: pnpm run ci:lint:client && pnpm run ci:lint:producer && pnpm run ci:lint:consumer
scripts.ci:build: pnpm run ci:build:server && pnpm run ci:build:client && pnpm run ci:build:docs
scripts.ci:build:docs: cross-env CI=true GITHUB_PAGES=true pnpm --filter mealio-docs build
scripts.ci:build:server: pnpm run ci:build:shared && pnpm run ci:build:producer && pnpm run ci:build:consumer
scripts.ci:test: pnpm run ci:test:client && pnpm run ci:test:producer && pnpm run ci:test:consumer
